title: 10 best herbal teas for stomach cramps
description: Lemon balm teas helps with stomach cramps because of its natural soothing properties that calm the digestive system. The herb contains rosmarinic acid, which has anti-inflammatory effects and helps to relax the muscles in the stomach, reducing spasms and discomfort. Additionally, lemon balm's calming effects on the nervous system can also help to ease anxiety and stress-induced cramps, providing a sense of relaxation and relief from digestive distress.
